THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA) N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIENDO, TATIANA C $5,831.02 PRINCIPAL, $334.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,165.52, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
